manifest.positioning: blockrun.ai is a prediction market analytics host focused on Polymarket and Kalshi. It serves agents that need to evaluate trader performance, browse available markets, or compare cohort-level statistics. Its distinguishing feature is the depth of wallet analytics — covering PnL, ROI, win rate, trading style classification, and position data across multiple time windows — alongside market discovery endpoints for both Polymarket and Kalshi.
manifest.host_overview: blockrun.ai provides read-only analytics and market data for Polymarket and Kalshi prediction markets. It exposes wallet-level performance metrics, historical candlestick data, cohort statistics, and market/event listings across both platforms. No trade execution or order book depth is available.
manifest.routing_guidance: Use blockrun.ai when an agent needs Polymarket wallet analytics (PnL, win rate, trading style, position history) or wants to browse Polymarket events and Kalshi market listings. It is the right choice for cohort-level benchmarking across Polymarket trader styles. Do not use it for trade execution on either platform — it is strictly read-only. Do not use it for real-time order book depth or live bid/ask prices; a dedicated Polymarket CLOB API or Kalshi trading API would be needed instead. For on-chain token balances or non-Polymarket/Kalshi prediction platforms, this host is not applicable.

capability_clusters.cluster_summary: Retrieves available Polymarket prediction market events with metadata such as titles, tags, status, and resolution dates, enabling agents to identify and filter markets of interest.
Fetches live Kalshi market listings including prices, volume, open interest, and settlement details for read-only market browsing.
Provides OHLC candlestick data for specific Polymarket condition IDs, supporting charting, backtesting, and historical trading activity analysis.
Returns current and historical position-level data for a Polymarket wallet, including shares held, cost basis, current value, and per-position PnL.

Delivers aggregated trading performance metrics for a Polymarket wallet across 1-day, 7-day, 30-day, and all-time windows, including realized/unrealized PnL, ROI, win rate, trade counts, fees, and trading style classification.
Returns aggregated statistics segmented by trader cohort (e.g. WHALE, ACTIVE_TRADER, DEGEN), enabling comparison of volume, PnL, win rates, and fees across trading style groups.

steps.description: Retrieve the wallet's current open and resolved positions, including market metadata, shares, cost basis, and per-position PnL.
Fetch aggregated performance metrics (PnL, ROI, win rate, trading style) across all time windows to contextualize the position data.

cross_skill_workflows.when_to_use: Use when an agent needs to build a complete picture of a specific Polymarket wallet, combining open position exposure with historical performance context.

steps.description: Retrieve the target wallet's performance metrics and trading style classification.
Fetch cohort-level aggregates for the matching trading style to benchmark the wallet's PnL, win rate, and volume against peers.

cross_skill_workflows.when_to_use: Use when an agent needs to evaluate how a specific wallet's performance compares to the broader Polymarket trader population segmented by style.

steps.description: Browse available Polymarket events to identify the relevant market and retrieve its condition ID.
Fetch OHLC candlestick data for the identified condition ID to analyze historical price and volume trends.

cross_skill_workflows.when_to_use: Use when an agent needs to identify a Polymarket event and then analyze its historical price behavior for a specific outcome.
cross_skill_workflows.workflow_name: Polymarket Market Research with Price History
